Day of Events
Sunday, April 18, 2027
The Wedding Day
Coral Gables, Florida

Ceremony
Please be seated by 5:15 PM.
The ceremony will begin promptly.

👗Dress Code

Cocktail/Formal — we kindly ask guests to dress in elegant cocktail attire. Think classy and polished: suits, dresses, and elevated wear.

🏠Indoor Event

The ceremony and reception will both be held indoors.

🍽️Dinner

Seated plated dinner with choice of entrée. Vegan and gluten-free options available. Indicate preference in your RSVP.

🎵Entertainment

Live music during cocktail hour. DJ & dancing to follow. Song requests welcome!

🍸Open Bar

Full open bar during cocktail hour and reception all evening long. Cheers! 🥂

Please be seated by 5:15 PM — the ceremony begins promptly at 5:30 PM. We cannot wait to celebrate with you!

We hope to celebrate with you
